title: ANC - 3b.-Change ANC from Adaptive to Standard and vice versa during call when Transparency is ON before call
scenario: ANC mode persists after call ends but Transparency behavior differs between Emu/Osprey/Tern and Lark/Peregrine devices when switching ANC during a call
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings.
2. Set ANC mode to OFF and ensure it is set to either Adaptive or Standard.
3. Set Transparency Mode to ON and ensure it is set to either Environment or Speech.
4. Start or join a call (e.g., Zoom, Teams, or Mobile call).
5. Observe that ANC turns ON with the previously selected option (Adaptive or Standard), and Transparency becomes greyed out and OFF.
6. Tap the Transparency toggle during the call.
7. Observe the popup informing that Transparency is not available during a call.
8. Change ANC between Adaptive and Standard during the call.
9. Verify that the user can switch between Adaptive and Standard while on the call.
11. On Emu/Osprey/Tern devices: Verify that ANC stays ON with the value selected during the call, and Transparency becomes accessible again (OFF, with previous value preserved).
12. On Lark/Peregrine devices: Verify that ANC turns OFF with the value selected during the call, and Transparency becomes accessible again (ON, with previous value preserved).
13. Tap the ANC toggle and the Transparency toggle.
14. Verify that the user can move between both ANC and Transparency modes.
expected: On Emu/Osprey/Tern: After the call, ANC stays ON with the value selected during the call, and Transparency becomes accessible again (OFF, with previous value preserved). On Lark/Peregrine: After the call, ANC turns OFF with the value selected during the call, and Transparency becomes accessible again (ON, with previous value preserved). In both cases, the user can toggle between ANC and Transparency modes freely after the call ends.
